records.ety: [Gr. <?/; 'anti`/ + 'ana`klasis a bending back and breaking. See Anaclastic.]

defs: A figure which consists in repeating the same word in a different sense; as, Learn some craft when young, that when old you may live without craft.
A repetition of words beginning a sentence, after a long parenthesis; as, Shall that heart (which not only feels them, but which has all motions of life placed in them), shall that heart, etc.
